---
event: file
action: warn
conditions:
  - field: file_path
    operator: regex_match
    pattern: "\\.llm-context/topics/code-structure\\.md"
---

## Auto-Generated File Warning

**Do not manually edit `.llm-context/topics/code-structure.md`**

This file is auto-generated by the `llm-context compress` command, which runs via a pre-commit hook. Manual edits will be overwritten on the next commit.

If code structure documentation needs updating:
1. Make your code changes
2. Commit - the pre-commit hook will regenerate `code-structure.md` automatically
